series_metadata.series_description: Physical badge that is provided to employees, contractors, and interns that allows access to designated facility and vehicle entrances. Information available on the security/ID badge may/will include name, a small photo, and assignment such as district or division. ODOT employees also utilize their badge to utilizing the time keeping service known as Kronos and also can obtain fuel for state vehicles through Fuelmaster.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: employee is no longer employed. Physical badges that are no longer utilized shall be returned responsible ODOT section and stored securely in a locked cabinet and destroyed by shredding (or other approved/secured means). A certificate of destruction should remain on file confirm destruction
